description: For the perfect finish in sprint racing, slip into these super comfy Sprint shoes from lotto. With a soft footbed and lugged outsole, your feet are sure to get all the support that they need to help you win in style.Upper Synthetic leather with stitched overlays for lightweight durability Central lacing for snug Fit Lightly padded tongue with collar for added comfort Outsole extended till the heel cup for anti-slippage function Midsole Soft, cushy printed footbed for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Full length phylon midsole for lightweight durability Outsole Rubber outsole with ridges below the arch of the foot for an ergonomic fit Circular lugs below the heel and forefoot for grip Vertical strip of rubber down the outsole with small flex grooves for superior traction shoe careDo not machine washRub with wet cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
